title: IES-R (Impact of Event Scale - Revised)
instruction: Below is a list of difficulties people sometimes have after stressful life events. Please read each item, and then indicate how distressing each difficulty has been for you DURING THE PAST SEVEN DAYS. Respond with 11 numbers (0–4).

questions.text: Any reminder brought back feelings about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely
0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: Other things kept making me think about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely
0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I avoided letting myself get upset when I thought about it or was reminded of it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I thought about it when I didn't mean to
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I felt as if it hadn't happened or wasn't real
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I stayed away from reminders about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: Pictures about it popped into my mind
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I was jumpy and easily startled
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I tried not to think about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely
